summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Portuguese pizza ordering system with QR code functionality. Core customer workflow is fully functional - menu loading, product selection, cart management, and order placement all working correctly.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 401 authentication error - authorization header not being passed correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard content not loading/rendering after successful login

issues: Console warnings for missing dialog descriptions - accessibility concern

passed_tests: Database seeding with 4 categories, 11 products, 10 tables
Products API - listing with variations and extras
Tables API - listing and lookup by number
Authentication - admin login with demo credentials
Menu page loading and category navigation
Product modal with add to cart functionality
QR code table parameter recognition (tested mesa=5)
success_percentage: Backend: 92.3% (12/13 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (customer workflow fully functional, admin dashboard has loading issues)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin dashboard stats API authentication header implementation and investigate dashboard content loading issues. The customer-facing core functionality is working perfectly.
